title: ellisochloa rangei
intro: Ellisochloa rangei, also known as the Australian finger grass, is a type of plant species native to the tropical regions of Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indigenous Australian medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ellisochloa rangei are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
